Source   Edit  

Combat resolution system - Battle, bombardment, invasion, and blitz operations

This module handles all combat-related resolution including:

  • Space battles with linear progression (space combat -> orbital combat)
  • Orbital bombardment of planetary defenses
  • Ground invasions of enemy colonies
  • Blitz operations (fast insertion variant)
  • Retreat processing and automated Seek Home

Imports

../../common/hex, ../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/combat, ../../common/types/units, ../gamestate, ../orders, ../fleet, ../squadron, ../starmap, ../spacelift, ../combat/engine, ../combat/types, ../combat/ground, ../economy/types, ../config/prestige_config, ../config/military_config, ../config/ground_units_config, ../prestige, types, fleet_orders

Procs

proc resolveBattle(state: var GameState; systemId: SystemId;
                   orders: Table[HouseId, OrderPacket];
                   combatReports: var seq[CombatReport];
                   events: var seq[GameEvent]) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Resolve combat at a system with linear progression (operations.md:7.0) Phase 1: Space Combat - non-guard mobile fleets fight first Phase 2: Orbital Combat - if attackers survive, fight guard/reserve fleets + starbases Uses orders to determine which fleets are on guard duty Source   Edit   
proc resolveBlitz(state: var GameState; houseId: HouseId; order: FleetOrder;
                  events: var seq[GameEvent]) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Process planetary blitz order (operations.md:7.6.2) Fast insertion variant - seizes assets intact but marines get 0.5x AS penalty Transports vulnerable to ground batteries during insertion Source   Edit   
proc resolveBombardment(state: var GameState; houseId: HouseId;
                        order: FleetOrder; events: var seq[GameEvent]) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Process planetary bombardment order (operations.md:7.5) Phase 2 of planetary combat - requires orbital supremacy Attacks planetary shields, ground batteries, and infrastructure Source   Edit   
proc resolveInvasion(state: var GameState; houseId: HouseId; order: FleetOrder;
                     events: var seq[GameEvent]) {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Process planetary invasion order (operations.md:7.6) Phase 3 of planetary combat - requires all ground batteries destroyed Marines attack ground forces to capture colony Source   Edit
